arts.ttl: He only managed 16 appearances for Nottingham Forest but he still managed to silence Derby County
Arsenal in pole position to sign £50m star after Real Madrid and Liverpool update
arts.sum: Although the club are said to have wanted to bring Zubimendi to London in the January transfer window, Sociedad agreed with the midfielder to postpone his sale until after this season. Arsenal still remain in the race to sign Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi.

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey drops early Arsenal team news hint as Mikel Arteta makes Mikel Merino decision
arts.sum: Arsenal head into the tie off the back of a disappointing defeat to West Ham. Jarrod Bowen fired the Hammers to a 1-0 victory at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday, ending the North Londoners' 15-game unbeaten streak . Thomas Partey has dropped a team news hint ahead of Arsenal's clash against Nottingham Forest .

arts.ttl: Arsenal title race referee review as big decisions impact Liverpool challenge
arts.sum: Already a tall ask due to Arne Slot's relentless consistency, the loss of both Gabriel Jesus and Kai Havertz to season-ending injuries - as well as lengthy spells out for Gabriel Martinelli and Bukayo Saka - has left Arsenal 11 points behind. Firstly, after being initially awarded a yellow card for bringing down Evanilson just outside the centre circle, Saliba was sent off after a VAR review .

arts.ttl: 'Problem': Jamie Carragher warns Arsenal that £27m star may leave if they don't start winning trophies quickly
arts.sum: Real Madrid are willing to pay £100M 💰

arts.ttl: EFL manager tells Nottingham Forest he really wants to sign ‘standout’ player
Family of tragic Arsenal and Everton icon Kevin Campbell demand answers over hospital care
arts.sum: The former Arsenal and Everton striker, 54, died from heart infection at Manchester Royal Infirmary in June last year

arts.ttl: Premier League Golden Glove race: Sels leads the way
arts.sum: The Premier League’s Golden Glove race is heating up with two of the leading contenders facing off tonight. Matz Sels and David Raya will be in opposite goals when Nottingham Forest face Arsenal, with the latter having led the Premier League for clean sheets last season. Sels is aiming to take the accolade this time […] The post Premier League Golden Glove race: Sels leads the way first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Chelsea, Arsenal, Saudis pursue PSG sporting director Luis Campos
arts.sum: Campos' three-year contract as Football Advisor to Paris Saint-Germain expires at the end of the season and he has opened the door to multiple suitors. Campos' record includes building Ligue 1 title-winning teams at AS Monaco and Lille that dethroned PSG, while generating over a billion Euros in transfer fees from player sales.

arts.ttl: 'Internally': Arsenal have already decided what to do about Raheem Sterling's future now - Fabrizio Romano
